## Issue Acceptance Criteria

Pass. `GateStage` and `GateMode` now have typed parse/display APIs in [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:771) and [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:882). `GateMode` derives `JsonSchema` at [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:918).

`GateDefinition.stage` and `.mode` are typed as `GateStage`/`GateMode` at [output.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/output.rs:1269), and serialization coverage confirms snake_case output at [output.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/output.rs:1695).

CLI stage/mode args use clap `value_enum` at [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:881) and [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:1411). Invalid registry stage input is covered at [registry_json_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/tests/registry_json_tests.rs:205).

`JIT_STAGE` now uses the shared `as_str()` path at [gate_execution.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/gate_execution.rs:55). I found no remaining `format!("{:?}", ...).to_lowercase()` usage for `GateStage` or `GateMode`.

## Architecture And Separation Of Concerns

Pass. Type definitions and parsing live in `domain/`; CLI argument validation stays in `cli.rs`; command methods consume typed values at [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:599) and [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:644); JSON shaping remains in `output.rs`.

## Functional Paradigm

Pass. The changed JSON conversion uses existing `From<Gate>` and iterator collection at [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2020) and [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2784). No unnecessary imperative parsing tables were introduced.

## Correctness And Invariants

Pass. No state-transition, gate-semantics, event logging, atomic write, assignee, label, or PID-safety code was weakened. The old duplicate stage/mode string mapping has been replaced by typed values and the canonical `as_str()` implementations at [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:834) and [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:944).

## Safety

Pass. No unsafe code was introduced in the reviewed paths.

## Testing

Pass. I did not rerun the full tests because the issue has a succeeded `cargo-ci` gate. The latest cargo-ci evidence is `.jit/gate-runs/c4a77ce1-7b0b-4111-8657-ab39da16e4b3/result.json:9`, with `fmt`, `clippy`, and `2641 passed, 0 failed` recorded at line 14.

Focused tests cover enum parsing/display at [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:2292), output serialization at [output.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/output.rs:1695), and invalid CLI stage rejection at [registry_json_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/tests/registry_json_tests.rs:205).

## Error Handling

Pass. Parse failures use typed `thiserror` errors with contextual messages at [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:784) and [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:895). I found no new `unwrap()`/`expect()` in library code outside tests.

## CLI Contract

Pass. The relevant gate and registry commands continue to support `--json`; gate list and registry list use typed `GateDefinition` serialization at [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2018) and [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2781).

## Documentation

Pass. The new public enum errors and methods include doc comments and `# Examples`, e.g. [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:771), [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:819), and [types.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/domain/types.rs:929). `GateDefinition` documents the typed serialization contract at [output.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-b22c041e/crates/jit/src/output.rs:1269).

## Prior Review Feedback

Pass. The prior code-review failure was solely `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` failing on a missing plan document. I reran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` and it now passes: `✓ Repository validation passed`.

Pass. `issue.dependencies` is empty in `.jit/issues/b22c041e-8281-45ea-8cab-88edf1c23fb8.json:23`, so there is no prerequisite work to verify. `cargo-ci` is passed in the issue metadata at `.jit/issues/b22c041e-8281-45ea-8cab-88edf1c23fb8.json:19`.
